text:
SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = Beneficiary did not meet claims criteria or have sufficient fee-for-service (FFS) coverage 
1 = Beneficiary met claims criteria but did not have sufficient FFS coverage 
2 = Beneficiary did not meet claims criteria but had sufficient FFS coverage 
3 = Beneficiary met claims criteria and had sufficient FFS coverage 

COMMENT: The CCW’s chronic condition indicator variables require beneficiaries to satisfy both claims criteria (a
